channel.title: London Property Demo Feed
channel.description: Demo XML feed for a London estate agency property catalogue, aligned with sales and lettings journeys.

item.g:title: Two-bedroom apartment near Clapham Common
item.g:description:
Apartment in Clapham with a London-focused property search experience. Demo listing inspired by estate agency sales and lettings journeys.
Area: Clapham | Listing type: For sale | Property type: Apartment | Condition: new | Identifier exists: false | Reference: PROP-00001
